calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
John Rueppel, Esq. 415-693-0550 415-609-1667 John@jkzllp.com for Plaintiff. (In-person)
Sean O'Neill 408-652-8039, 510-933-8321, O'Neill P.C. for Defendant.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERs JKZ LLP,and JOHN RUEPPEL Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Petitioners JKZ LLC and John S. Rueppel's petition to confirm arbitration award is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-09-2025 Continued To Aug-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
John S. Rueppel, Esq., JKZ LLP, (415) 693-0550 john@jkzllp.com Attorney for Petitioners, JKZ LLP and John S. Rueppel
Sean M. O'Neill, ESQ., O'NEILL, P.C. (510) 933-8321 sean@oneillplc.com Attorney for Defendant Sonia Martinez Douglass (ZOOM)

Hearing is held. Discussed, not argued. The Court vacates its tenative ruling and make the following ruling:

PETITIONERS JKZ LLP, JOHN RUEPPEL'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to August 7, 2025. Reply due July 25, 2025.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk; W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/HEK)
